::: top-banner
:::

# Participants

Below is the current working participant list for the workshop.

| Name | Institution |
|------|-------------|
| Cesar Penaherrera | MigraMar |
| Mario Pardo | CICESE |
| Ariadna Juarez | CICESE |
| Shaleyla Kelez | EcOceánica |
| Boris DeWitt | CEAZA; IRD France |
| Yulia Egorova | University of Miami |
| Ilena Zanella | Misión Tiburón |
| Luis Vedinana | Universidad Austral de Chile |
| Frank Garita | Panacetacea |
| Gabriel Vianna | Charles Darwin Foundation |
| Isaac Brito | MCSS |
| Lee Hannah | MCSS |
| Christian/Marco | CI Mesoamerica |
| Mariana Vera | CI Ecuador |
| Fausto Arias | CI Costa Rica |
| Damian Pardo | CI Colombia |
| Dylan Glave | MCSS |
| Tito Navia | GIZ |
| Leonardo Marriaga | CPPS |
